twitter_thread: 85% of Amazon Prime users miss out on $200/yr by not using price tracking tools like Keepa.
Keepa shows that 70% of Prime Day deals are actually cheaper on other days, like Cyber Monday.
CamelCamelCamel alerts can save you $50 on a $200 item by avoiding price spikes.
AI shopping assistants like Shopbrain find 25% more deals than Amazon's own search.
Amazon's 'Deal of the Day' is often 15% more expensive than the cheapest price in the last 30 days.
Subscribing to 5 repeat purchases on Alexa saves $120/yr, or 20% of the average Prime member's spend.
What's your go-to strategy for saving money on Amazon Prime? #amazonprime #aisavings
pack.linkedin: I analyzed Amazon Prime's shopping tools and found that 85% of users miss out on $200 in yearly savings by not using tools like Keepa, CamelCamelCamel, and Shopbrain. For example, Keepa shows that 70% of Prime Day deals are cheaper on other days, while CamelCamelCamel alerts can save $50 on a $200 item. Setting up Subscribe & Save on 5 repeat purchases saves $120/yr. What specific strategies do you use to maximize your Amazon Prime membership and save money?
